top_signals.title: Transparency data: HM Treasury organisational charts
top_signals.summary: HM Treasury structure charts and organisational data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Origin of crab walk dates back some 200 million years
top_signals.summary: The team recorded movements of 50 crab species — 35 species that had adopted sideways walking and 15 species that walked forward.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SEC delays tokenized asset exemption amid concerns over third-party tokens: Bloomberg Law
top_signals.summary: The SEC has delayed its plan for an anticipated exemption that would clarify the agency's stance on tokenized assets, Bloomberg Law reported.
